command.gmodEntityExplorer.refresh.title: Refresh
command.gmodEntityExplorer.search.title: Search
command.gmodErrors.clear.title: Clear
command.gmodRdb.checkForUpdates.title: GMod Debugger: Check for Updates
config.common.enum.default.description: Use value from `.emmyrc.json` or fall back to default
config.emmylua.codeAction.insertSpace.de: Add space after `---` comments when inserting `@diagnostic disable-next-line`.
config.emmylua.completion.autoRequire.de: Automatically insert a call to `require` when autocomplete inserts objects from other modules.
config.emmylua.completion.baseFunctionIn: Include the name in the base function completion (e.g. `function name() end`).
config.emmylua.completion.callSnippet.de: Insert function-call snippets during completion. Zero-argument calls stay as `name()`, while calls with parameters place the cursor at the first argument.
config.emmylua.completion.postfix.descri: Symbol that's used to trigger postfix autocompletion.
config.emmylua.completion.stagedCallSnip: Stage known API call snippets so autocomplete can guide through the next relevant argument.
config.emmylua.diagnostics.diagnosticInt: Delay between changing a file and scanning it for errors, in milliseconds.
config.emmylua.documentColor.enable.desc: Enable parsing strings for color tags and showing a color picker next to them.
config.emmylua.hint.enumParamHint.descri: Show the name of the enumerator when passing a literal value to a function that expects an enum.
config.emmylua.hint.metaCallHint.descrip: Show a hint when calling an object invokes its meta table's `__call` function.
config.emmylua.hint.overrideHint.descrip: Show methods that override functions from base class.
config.emmylua.hint.paramHint.descriptio: Show parameter names in function calls and parameter types in function definitions.
config.emmylua.language.completeAnnotati: Automatically insert `"---"` when line breaking after a comment
config.emmylua.ls.executablePath.descrip: Override the path to the EmmyLua language server executable. Uses the bundled server if not specified.
config.emmylua.ls.globalConfigPath.descr: Path to the global `.emmyrc.json`. These settings are used if not overridden by the project's config.
config.emmylua.ls.startParameters.descri: Additional arguments to pass to the EmmyLua language server.
config.emmylua.references.fuzzySearch.de: Use fuzzy search when searching for symbol usages if normal search finds nothing.
config.emmylua.references.shortStringSea: Also search for usages in strings.
config.emmylua.semanticTokens.renderDocu: Render Markdown/RST in documentation. Set `doc.syntax` for this option to have effect.
config.emmylua.workspace.enableReindex.d: Enable full project reindex after changing a file.
config.emmylua.workspace.reindexDuration: Delay between changing a file and full project reindex, in milliseconds.
config.gluals.codeAction.insertSpace.des: Add space after `---` comments when inserting `@diagnostic disable-next-line`.
config.gluals.completion.autoRequire.des: Automatically insert a call to `require` when autocomplete inserts objects from other modules.
config.gluals.completion.baseFunctionInc: Include the name in the base function completion (e.g. `function name() end`).
config.gluals.completion.callSnippet.des: Whether to use call snippets in completions.
config.gluals.completion.postfix.descrip: Symbol that's used to trigger postfix autocompletion.
config.gluals.completion.stagedCallSnipp: Stage known API call snippets so autocomplete can guide through the next relevant argument.
config.gluals.diagnostics.diagnosticInte: Delay between changing a file and scanning it for errors, in milliseconds.
config.gluals.documentColor.enable.descr: Enable parsing strings for color tags and showing a color picker next to them.
config.gluals.gmod.templatePath.descript: Path to a folder with custom GLua scaffolding templates (`.lua` files). Accepts an absolute path or a path relative to the workspace root.
config.gluals.hint.closingEndHint.descri: Show an inlay hint after closing `end` keywords to indicate their block. Only shown when the block spans at least `closingEndHintMinLines` lines.
config.gluals.hint.closingEndHintControl: Show closing `end` hints for control flow blocks (if, while, do, for). Requires `closingEndHint` to be enabled.
config.gluals.hint.closingEndHintMinLine: Minimum number of lines a block must span before a closing `end` hint is shown.
config.gluals.hint.enumParamHint.descrip: Show the name of the enumerator when passing a literal value to a function that expects an enum.
config.gluals.hint.metaCallHint.descript: Show a hint when calling an object invokes its meta table's `__call` function.
config.gluals.hint.overrideHint.descript: Show methods that override functions from base class.
config.gluals.hint.paramHint.description: Show parameter names in function calls and parameter types in function definitions.
config.gluals.references.fuzzySearch.des: Use fuzzy search when searching for symbol usages if normal search finds nothing.
config.gluals.references.shortStringSear: Also search for usages in strings.
config.gluals.semanticTokens.renderDocum: Render Markdown/RST in documentation. Set `doc.syntax` for this option to have effect.
config.gluals.strict.inferredTypeMismatc: Report type mismatch diagnostics for inferred values when strict mode is enabled.
config.gluals.workspace.enableReindex.de: Enable full project reindex after changing a file.
Delay between changing a file and full project reindex, in milliseconds.
config.gmod.debugger.autoUpdateRdb.descr: Automatically prompt to update `gm_rdb` and `rdb_client` (the GMod debugger modules) when an outdated version is detected during the background update check.
config.lua.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VSCode and the EmmyLua language server in the Output view. Default is `off`
debug.gmod.attach.desc: Attach to a running Garry's Mod remote debugger
debug.gmod.attach.label: GMod: Attach to gm_rdb
debug.gmod.attach.name: GMod: Attach
debug.gmod.launch.desc: Launch a program and attach to gm_rdb over TCP
debug.gmod.launch.label: GMod: Launch and Attach
debug.gmod.launch.name: GMod: Launch and Attach
debug.gmod.program: Program to launch before connecting to gm_rdb
debug.gmod.sourceFileMap: Optional source file mappings from local path to remote Lua path
debug.gmod.stopOnEntry: Stop when the debuggee emits entry pause
debug.gmod.stopOnError: Pause execution when gm_rdb reports a Lua runtime error

view.gmodErrors.title: Errors
view.gmodErrors.welcome: No errors detected in this debug session.
